hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */data/KI/*) ;; */data/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"AGENTS.md 5.5: databases under data/ are read-only to AI coding tools - data/KI is the only writable one (it is the disposable test DB). data/ is gitignored with no backup, so a wrong write is permanent data loss. Read/search this DB freely; ask the user before writing to it."}}' ;; esac; }
